services.title: Software Development
services.description: We design and build web, mobile, and enterprise systems — from MVP to scalable enterprise-grade platforms.
services.details: We follow an architecture-first approach: modularity, security, and scalability are built in from day one. Teams include backend, frontend, mobile, and DevOps engineers led by a Lead Architect.
features: Web apps, SaaS, and admin panels
Code review, documentation, and knowledge transfer

services.title: Software Testing
services.description: End-to-end QA for products where a production failure costs money, reputation, or compliance penalties.
services.details: We combine manual and automated testing: test strategy, regression suites, CI/CD integration, and audit-ready reporting. Experienced in fintech, e-commerce, healthtech, and other regulated industries.

services.title: AI Projects
services.description: We deploy ML, NLP, and computer vision where they deliver measurable business impact — not hype.
services.details: From discovery and PoC to production: data preparation, model training, LLM fine-tuning, drift monitoring, and post-launch support. Experience across fintech, retail, manufacturing, and logistics.
features: LLM assistants and chatbots for support/sales
Computer vision, OCR, and video analytics

services.title: DevOps & Cloud
services.description: We set up infrastructure and delivery pipelines so releases are predictable and systems stay resilient under load.
services.details: Cloud architecture (AWS, Azure, GCP), containerization, CI/CD, monitoring, and disaster recovery. We help teams move from manual deploys to automated pipelines with rollback and alerting.
features: AWS, Azure, GCP — design and migrations

services.title: IT Consulting
services.description: We help you make the right technology decisions before development starts — and fix course when the product is already struggling.
services.details: Technical audits, architecture reviews, delivery process assessment, and team evaluation. Roadmaps, TCO estimates, and build vs buy recommendations. From one-off sessions to 3–6 month embedded consulting.
features: Due diligence for M&A and investors

services.title: Support & Maintenance
services.description: We take ownership of system stability after launch: monitoring, incidents, updates, and evolution under SLA.
services.details: L1/L2/L3 support with clear SLA on response and resolution times. Runbooks, post-mortems, capacity planning, and security patches without downtime on business-critical features.
features: Regular health checks and update roadmaps

projects.title: Smart call center assistant
projects.description: LLM assistant for a fintech call center with CRM and telephony integration and secure handoff to live agents.
projects.details: FinTech Ukraine handled over 15,000 requests per month; agents spent up to 70% of their time on routine payment, limit, and card-block inquiries. Partnerio ran discovery with business and compliance, built an intent catalog, and developed a fine-tuned LLM with RAG on a knowledge base. The assistant verifies customers via KYC, responds in dialog context, and escalates with full transcription.
results: Call center NPS +12 pp in 6 months

projects.title: E-commerce platform
projects.description: Omnichannel marketplace for a retail chain: B2C and B2B, payments, logistics, and analytics for 50,000+ SKUs.
projects.details: Retail Group was scaling offline stores and had fragmented systems for shops, wholesale, and online sales. We designed a microservices platform: catalog, cart, orders, payments, promos, and reporting with a unified customer profile. Focus on Black Friday performance and a category manager module with ABC analytics.
results: B2B channel without a separate platform

projects.title: Banking system test automation
projects.description: Enterprise test framework for core banking: API, UI, production smoke, and audit-ready reporting.
projects.details: NovaBank shipped core banking releases every 2 weeks, but regression took 5 business days and blocked delivery. Partnerio built a layered framework: contract API tests, Playwright scenarios for 40+ critical user flows, nightly staging smoke, and post-deploy checks. Allure reports integrated with Jira for the compliance team.

projects.title: Manufacturing quality control system
projects.description: Real-time CV for conveyor defect detection with edge inference and MES integration.
projects.details: IndustrialTech relied on manual inspection — causing delays, human error, and scaling issues on new lines. We collected a defect dataset, trained a PyTorch model, optimized inference with TensorRT on edge servers, and connected MES alerts for automatic batch stops. Added a QA dashboard with defect heatmaps.

team.name: Anton Fil
team.bio: Founder and CEO of Partnerio, Lead Architect with 20 years of enterprise development experience. Defines company architecture strategy, engineering standards, and technical due diligence for key projects. Directly involved in fintech, banking, and high-load platforms. Leads architecture committees, critical code reviews, and mentors team leads.

team.name: Olga Korneva
team.bio: Chief Technology Officer at Partnerio. Owns technology strategy, stack selection, platform architecture, and AI/ML adoption in client products. Experienced in building R&D processes, scaling 50+ engineer teams, and monolith → microservices migrations. Oversees security, performance, and delivery quality.

team.name: Serhii Mazur
team.bio: Chief Financial Officer at Partnerio. Manages financial planning, project budgeting, management accounting, and IT company cost optimization. Experience with international contracts (EU, US), FX risk, and financial reporting for enterprise clients. Ensures transparency across T&M, fixed price, and dedicated team models.

team.name: Kateryna Levchenko
team.bio: Chief Operating Officer at Partnerio. Owns delivery processes, team scaling, service quality, and SLA compliance. Implemented Agile/Scrum practices, PM KPIs, and regular client reporting. Experience managing a portfolio of 15+ parallel enterprise projects and onboarding new clients within 2 weeks.

testimonials.name: Ihor Petrenko
testimonials.text: We needed an AI assistant for our call center before peak season — timelines were tight. Partnerio delivered an MVP in 3 months, integrated CRM and telephony. Now 60% of routine dialogs are automated, and agents get full context on escalation. Weekly demos, transparent backlog, no end-of-project surprises — exactly what we expect from a vendor.

testimonials.name: Olena Sydorenko
testimonials.text: After launching the e-commerce platform with Partnerio, we process 2,000+ orders per day at peak. We especially value the architecture — B2B and B2C in one system without data duplication. Partnerio's QA team built automation and production bugs dropped 80%. Communication at product owner level, not a black-box dev shop.

testimonials.name: Viktor Lysenko
testimonials.text: Core banking is not a project where you can gamble on timelines. Partnerio assembled a team that understands regulated environments: audit trails, compliance reports, documentation. Regression went from 5 days to 4 hours — that changed our release cadence. Architecture scales, and technical docs let our internal team take over support quickly.

stats.label: Specialists
stats.description: Backend, frontend, mobile, QA, DevOps, and ML engineers. Average team experience — 7+ years. 40% at senior and lead level.

stats.label: Projects
stats.description: Successfully delivered solutions for clients in 15 countries: fintech, retail, manufacturing, healthtech, logistics, miltech.

stats.label: Satisfied clients
stats.description: Return with new tasks, extend support contracts, and recommend Partnerio to partners and investors.
